name: nvfp4_gemm_skinny_optimization
description: For NVFP4 GEMM with small M (128), PyTorch's default CUTLASS tile (256x192x256) wastes resources. Custom 128x128x256 tile with 1x1 cluster is 15% faster. cuBLASLt C API does NOT support NVFP4 -- PyTorch uses CUTLASS internally. CUDA Graphs save 2-3us launch overhead. out= parameter on _scaled_mm eliminates DtoD copy.
when_to_apply: FP4 GEMM on B200 with small M dimension (M <= 256). Also applies to any _scaled_mm call where output copy is unnecessary.

evidence.detail: Custom CUTLASS tile + CUDA Graphs + out= parameter

discovered_from: GPU MODE NVFP4 GEMM competition, 136 tool calls
